positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for hydrocarbon_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~is_a(mixture,chemical_compound)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(mixture)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define chemical_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define organic_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for hydrocarbon_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~is_a(mixture,chemical_compound)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(mixture)).

cnf(u35,negated_conjecture,
    hydrocarbon(mixture)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    alkane(mixture)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~alkane(X0) | hydrocarbon(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~hydrocarbon(X0) | organic_compound(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)).

cnf(u37,negated_conjecture,
    chemical_compound(mixture)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~organic_compound(X0) | chemical_compound(X0)).

cnf(u36,negated_conjecture,
    organic_compound(mixture)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
